name: Trenton (United States)

colors.symbolism: the hoist half; New Jersey state blue
the fly half; New Jersey state buff/gold

description: A field divided vertically — blue at the hoist, gold at the fly — with the seal of the City of Trenton centred across the dividing line.
history: Used by the City of Trenton, the capital of New Jersey, with colours echoing the historic blue-and-buff of the state.

features.symbolism: Blue and gold (buff), historic colours of New Jersey associated with the state during the American Revolution.

features.role: Seal of the City of Trenton
features.symbolism: The municipal seal of Trenton, capital of New Jersey since 1790 and the site of the 1776 Battle of Trenton, a pivotal American Revolutionary War victory.
